name: @avant-garde/skill-email-campaign
description: Email Campaign Agent skill pack (docs/email-campaign-agent, Klaviyo-first): email/ artifact formats (strategy, calendar, campaign, skeleton), ungated planning + Klaviyo read tools, and the four spec 20 Actions (approve_plan, create_campaign_draft, schedule_campaign, cancel_send). Plans derive from the Brand Soul; nothing sends without an approval nonce.
